define_state.goal_statement: Reduce moisture content from 16% to 15% within the next 3 months, ensuring compliance with specification limits.

in_scope: Quality control measures related to moisture content
Training for operators on moisture management with a defined curriculum and schedule
out_of_scope: Other quality metrics not related to moisture content
Supplier management outside of moisture-related issues

ctq_list.name: Moisture Content
ctq_list.description: The amount of moisture present in the product, aiming for a maximum of 15%.

ctq_list.name: Product Consistency
ctq_list.description: The uniformity of moisture content across different batches.

ctq_list.name: Product Quality Rating
ctq_list.description: Overall quality assessment based on moisture content and other factors, defined by specific criteria.

measures: Monitor moisture content weekly with baseline measurements established
Track product quality ratings bi-weekly with defined criteria
Conduct regular training sessions for operators based on a detailed curriculum

define_state.risk_level: Medium with a detailed risk assessment and mitigation plan to be developed.

feedback.user_feedback: goal is to reduce max 14.5%, ctq is mositure content product max 14.5% optimizing production cost (drying cost) yet stil fulfilling specification
